message:
Running command: # The key is: slave_mask[i] = (paddr & ADDR_MASK[i]) == ADDR_MAP[i]
# Let me check how the APB splitter is instantiated in nc_mcu_fabric
grep -n "nc_apb_splitter\|apb0_split\|ADDR_MAP\|ADDR_MASK" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30

function.arguments: {"command": "# The key is: slave_mask[i] = (paddr & ADDR_MASK[i]) == ADDR_MAP[i]\n# Let me check how the APB splitter is instantiated in nc_mcu_fabric\ngrep -n \"nc_apb_splitter\\|apb0_split\\|ADDR_MAP\\|ADDR_MASK\" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# The key is: slave_mask[i] = (paddr & ADDR_MASK[i]) == ADDR_MAP[i]

grep -n "nc_apb_splitter\|apb0_split\|ADDR_MAP\|ADDR_MASK" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30
